title: transaction — HTTP routes
description: READ-ONLY tenant-facing surface (admin + finance role only) — transaction ledger read + per-account balance read + General Ledger report + reconciliation audit trail. The ONE write endpoint is POST /transactions/{id}/reverse (admin-only) which creates a NEW offsetting transaction (never mutates the original). Every tenant-plane route carries `entitlement.enforce:transaction_capture` at minimum; the report + export routes carry `entitlement.enforce:transaction_advanced_reporting`; the on-demand reconciliation endpoint carries `entitlement.enforce:transaction_ledger_reconciliation_api`. There is NO POST /transactions endpoint — transactions are recorded ONLY via internal service (TransactionRecorder) called by invoice / payment / refund / chargeback modules.

groups.name: tenant-transactions
groups.description: Transaction ledger read + reversal escape hatch. NO POST for direct create — every transaction is recorded via TransactionRecorder from invoice / payment / refund / chargeback modules.

routes.description: filter[kind], filter[status], filter[reference_type], filter[reference_id], filter[from], filter[to], filter[currency], filter[has_reversal]. Default sort: effective_date DESC, transaction_number DESC. Returns paginated transaction ledger for the tenant.
Includes full ledger entry set + reference entity chain + reversal chain (if this transaction was reversed OR is itself a reversal). Amount + ledger entries visible only to admin + finance role.
The load-bearing double-entry line items for this transaction. Admin + finance role only.

Admin-ONLY manual reversal. Creates a NEW offsetting transaction with reversal_reason='accounting_adjustment'. Body: { amendment_note: string (required, ≥ 10 chars — regulator-visible justification), effective_date?: ISO date (defaults to today) }. Refuses when transaction.status != 'posted'. Refuses when transaction already has a reversal in this direction. Every fire writes a critical audit row + fires TransactionAmendmentRequested + TransactionAmendmentAppliedNotification (cannot-opt-out).

groups.name: tenant-ledger
groups.description: Ledger account read + running balance + reconciliation audit trail. Admin + finance role only.

routes.description: List every account in the chart-of-accounts + current running balance per account. Includes account, current_balance_cents (signed), currency, threshold state (below_low_watermark / above_high_watermark / normal).
Detail for a specific account: current balance + recent entries + threshold config.
Running-balance history for the account. ?from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD (default: last 90 days). Returns time-series with running balance after each entry.

General Ledger report. ?from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD (default: previous calendar month) &format=json|csv|jsonl. Returns per-account opening balance + all posted transactions + closing balance + total debits + total credits. Medium+ only.
Reconciliation audit trail. Returns the last N reconciliation runs (default 30 days) + any detected imbalances. ?from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD. Enterprise-only.
Cross-tenant transaction read. filter[tenant_id], filter[kind], filter[from], filter[to]. Used by ops + support for support-intervention scenarios.

Force a reconciliation run for a specific tenant. Body: { tenant_id, scope: 'per_transaction' | 'per_account_daily' | 'global_tenant', from?: ISO date, to?: ISO date, note: string (required — regulator audit context) }. Every fire notifies the tenant admin + writes an audit row with 7-year retention. Super_admin + ops only.
Cross-tenant view of every detected ledger imbalance (from LedgerImbalanceDetected event history). Feeds the ops finance-health dashboard. filter[tenant_id], filter[scope], filter[resolved].
